title: WE Learn B1U6 Part-time jobs 翻译练习

questions.title: 【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 中译英】他在公司里负责维护网站。
options: He is in charge of the website in the company.
He is responsible of the website in the company.
questions.correct_answer: A. He is in charge of the website in the company.

questions.title: 【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 中译英】我们在学校里读书，同时也在一些商店或公司兼职。
options: We study at school and at the same time we do some part-time jobs in some shops or companies.
We learn at school and do work in shops or companies at the same time.
questions.correct_answer: A. We study at school and at the same time we do some part-time jobs in some shops or companies.

questions.title: 【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 中译英】这家餐厅需要招聘几个服务生。
options: This restaurant is needed to employ several waiters.
This restaurant is in need of several waiters.
questions.correct_answer: B. This restaurant is in need of several waiters.

questions.title: 【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 中译英】一勤天下无难事。
options: There is nothing that cannot be accomplished through hard work.
Nothing is difficult without hard work.
questions.correct_answer: A. There is nothing that cannot be accomplished through hard work.

questions.title: 【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 中译英】我们要发扬追求卓越的工匠精神。
options: We will carry forward the craftsmanship spirit of striving for the best.
We will step up the craftsmanship spirit to strive for the best.
questions.correct_answer: A. We will carry forward the craftsmanship spirit of striving for the best.

questions.title:
【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 英译中】

There were already four male candidates in the boss's office. Obviously, the boss had difficulty in deciding whom he would employ because he said finally, "Well, I need to check your references before I can make a decision. I've got your telephone numbers and will call the boy I want. But remember whoever is going to be employed must be prepared to work here from 6:00 to 8:00 every evening. That's all."
questions.correct_answer: 餐厅老板的办公室里早已有了四个男性应聘者。很显然，老板也难以决定到底录用谁。他最后说，“那这样吧，我要先核实一下你们的简历才能做决定。我有你们的电话号码，我决定了录用谁，就会打电话通知他的。但是请记住：不管是准被录用，都必须每天晚上六点到八点过来上班。就这样。”
